summary: Tested REACHTeaserSection (LPOS v1.0 REACH Diagnostic) on homepage. Found and fixed a critical import error (default vs named export mismatch in HomePage.jsx). After fix, all 10 test criteria passed.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: HomePage.jsx used `import REACHTeaserSection from ...` (default import) but REACHTeaserSection.jsx exports a named export `export function REACHTeaserSection`. This caused a compile error crashing the entire homepage.
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Changed import to `import { REACHTeaserSection } from '../components/REACHTeaserSection'` in HomePage.jsx

test_results.all_6_metrics: PASS (MIN_COMMITMENT, OP_DISCIPLINE, AUTHORITY_READINESS, DIAGNOSTIC_PRECEDENCE, DATA_POINTS, THRESHOLD_CLASS / LP-STD-001)
test_results.CTA_text: PASS - BEGIN DIAGNOSTIC SCAN — STEP 1 OF THE STANDARD

context_for_next_testing_agent: REACHTeaserSection is now fully functional on the homepage. Import was fixed from default to named export. All content, CTA, pillars, metrics verified passing.
